# platformStartExecution

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the platformStartExecution mutation (compute target)

## Usage

```bash
constructive-functions compute:platform-start-execution --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.graphId <UUID> --input.inputPayload <JSON> --input.outputNode <String> --input.outputPort <String> --input.maxTicks <Int> --input.maxPendingJobs <Int> --input.timeoutInterval <IntervalInput> --input.parentExecutionId <UUID> --input.parentNodeName <String>
```
